plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

plugins.successComment:
🎉 This ${issue.pull_request ? 'PR is included' : 'issue has been resolved'} in version ${nextRelease.version} which has been released! 🎉

The release is available on [GitHub](${nextRelease.gitHead ? `https://github.com/MikeBlakeway/media-labs/releases/tag/v${nextRelease.version}` : 'GitHub'})
plugins.failComment:
❌ The release from branch ${branch.name} had failed due to the following errors:
- ${errors.map(err => err.message).join('\n- ')}
